code: import React from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function RiskChart(_ref){let{summary}=_ref;if(!summary){return null;}const total=summary.total_containers||1;const criticalPercent=(summary.critical_count/total*100).toFixed(1);const lowPercent=(summary.low_risk_count/total*100).toFixed(1);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Risk Distribution"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"muted",children:"Visual split of prioritization outcomes across the uploaded batch."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bar-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:["Critical (",summary.critical_count,")"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"bar-track",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"bar-fill critical",style:{width:"".concat(criticalPercent,"%")}})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("strong",{children:[criticalPercent,"%"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bar-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:["Low Risk (",summary.low_risk_count,")"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"bar-track",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"bar-fill low",style:{width:"".concat(lowPercent,"%")}})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("strong",{children:[lowPercent,"%"]})]})]});}export default RiskChart;
